title: How to Write a Resume in 2026: The Complete Step-by-Step Guide
metaTitle: How to Write a Resume in 2026: Complete Guide with Examples | ResumeAI
metaDescription: Learn how to write a resume in 2026 with our step-by-step guide. Includes real examples, expert tips, and AI-powered resume builder.
excerpt: Master the art of resume writing in 2026 with AI-friendly formats, keyword optimization, and proven strategies.
author: ResumeAI Team
introduction:
Writing a resume in 2026 is very different from just a few years ago. With AI-powered Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) processing over 75% of all applications, your resume needs to be both human-compelling and machine-readable.

Whether you are a fresh graduate or a seasoned professional, this guide walks you through creating a resume that passes ATS screening and lands more interviews.

steps.heading: Choose the Right Resume Format
steps.content: The first decision is choosing your resume format. Reverse-Chronological lists experience most recent first - preferred by 90% of recruiters. Functional focuses on skills. Combination mixes both.

steps.heading: Optimize for ATS and Keywords
steps.content: ATS scans for keywords. Study the job description and incorporate them naturally. Use industry-standard terms. Avoid tables and graphics.

steps.heading: Write a Powerful Professional Summary
steps.content: Keep it 2-3 sentences covering your role, key skills, and value. Example: Results-driven engineer with 5+ years building scalable web applications.

steps.heading: Quantify Your Achievements
steps.content: Use numbers. Instead of Managed a team, say Led 8 engineers delivering 12 features, increasing engagement by 35%.
Numbers make achievements concrete. Use STAR method for each bullet point.

steps.heading: Include the Right Sections
steps.content: Contact, Summary, Experience, Education, Skills, Certifications - in order.

steps.heading: Proofread and Test
steps.content: Use spell check, get a review, test with ATS simulator, save as PDF.

example:
JOHN SMITH
john.smith@email.com

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Senior PM with 8+ years in B2B SaaS. Led products generating $50M+ annual revenue.

EXPERIENCE
TechCorp - Led AI analytics platform. 45% retention increase. Team of 12.

faq.q: How long should a resume be?
faq.a: One page for most professionals. Two max for senior roles.
No in US/Europe. Yes in some countries.
Yes. Tailor summary and top bullets.

conclusion: A well-crafted resume lands more interviews. Use our AI Resume Builder to create a professional resume instantly.
